name: Axis Bank My Zone Credit Card
milestoneBenefits: 1,000 EDGE REWARD Points on annual spends of Rs 1.5 lakh for eligible customers onboarded from 1 April 2025
SonyLIV Premium membership renewal on spending Rs 1.5 lakh in a card anniversary year for eligible paid-card customers onboarded before 31 March 2025
additionalBenefits: SonyLIV Premium annual subscription worth Rs 1,499 on first purchase within 30 days of issuance
Buy one get one movie ticket on District app, capped at Rs 200 per month
Flat Rs 120 off on Swiggy food delivery twice per month on minimum order value of Rs 500
AJIO discount offers including up to Rs 1,000 off on eligible purchases
1 complimentary domestic airport lounge visit per calendar quarter (4 per year) on spends of Rs 50,000 in the last 3 months
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions
